description: A thousand-year-old ancient town by the Li River, featured as the backdrop of the 20 RMB banknote, rustic and tranquil, with picturesque landscapes.
Located within Jingjiang Princes' City, the highest point in Guilin, offering a panoramic view of the entire city.
Bamboo raft tour along the essence section of the Li River, passing by scenic spots such as Nine Horses Mountain and Yellow Cloth Reflection, featured on the 20 RMB banknote.
Guilin's historical and cultural district, a pedestrian street integrating traditional architecture, local snacks, and creative shops.
Yangshuo's premium drifting experience, riding bamboo rafts through idyllic landscapes, enjoying the serene and profound beauty of nature.
A large-scale outdoor performance directed by Zhang Yimou, a stunning visual and auditory feast staged on the Li River.
Yangshuo's classic cycling route, showcasing picturesque rural scenery along the way, with iconic Guilin mountain and countryside views.
A park with lakes located in Guilin city, offering a serene environment perfect for morning exercises and leisurely walks.
A landmark attraction in Guilin, resembling a giant elephant drinking water with its trunk, symbolizing Guilin's unique landscape.
The central commercial pedestrian street in Guilin, featuring local snacks, specialties, and nightlife, providing an authentic cultural experience.
